original_statement: who was the only contestant at reina nacional de belleza miss república dominicana 2007 less than 1.7 meters tall?
mutated_statement: who was the only person at a certain event that year less than a given height?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 角色泛化 + 数值泛化 + 时间指代化: 具体赛事名称和地点被泛化为“a certain event” | “contestant（参赛者）”被泛化为更一般的“person（人）” | 具体身高“1.7 meters”被替换为模糊表述“a given height” | 具体年份“2007”被替换为指代“that year” (reina nacional de belleza miss república dominicana 2007 → a certain event that year | contestant → person | 1.7 meters → a given height | 2007 → that year)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中明确陈述“From the table... the only individual with a height less than 1.70 m is Alicia Fernández de la Cruz at 1.69 m”以及initial_judge中simple_query返回具体姓名，可见agent直接给出确定答案且未提及模糊性或请求澄清。具体表现为：直接使用已有表格信息做出断言，未使用ambiguous/unclear/无法确定等词语，也未向用户反问或标注假设。由于缺乏任何对问题泛化后不确定性的识别与询问，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”分类。
